subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is verily the Lord of creation, their Educator and their Sustainer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه مالک الخلق و مربیهم و مویدهم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
